vocab.example: I remember the excitement of seeing the first tender shoots of my bean plants poking through the soil.
As a child, I was absolutely captivated by the germination process, checking my seeds every single morning.
Since we lived in a small apartment, my gardening was limited to a few hardy potted plants on the balcony.

vocab.meaning: sở thích mang tính trị liệu/thư giãn
vocab.example: Even at a young age, I found tending to my roses to be a therapeutic hobby that helped me unwind after school.

vocab.meaning: loài cây có sức sống bền bỉ/kiên cường
vocab.example: I mostly grew cacti because they are a resilient species that could withstand my occasional forgetfulness.

vocab.meaning: nở hoa rực rỡ (thường là bất ngờ hoặc đồng loạt)
vocab.example: It was such a rewarding sight when my lilies finally decided to burst into bloom in early summer.

vocab.meaning: kiến thức về thực vật học
vocab.example: My grandfather helped me expand my botanical knowledge by teaching me the Latin names of the herbs we grew.
I felt quite heartbroken when my first batch of seedlings began to wither away due to overwatering.
I attempted to transform our small porch into a corner of lush greenery by planting ferns and ivy.
My parents encouraged me to grow my own organic produce, such as cherry tomatoes and cucumbers, in the backyard.
